title: cloudwatch_alarm
description: One CloudWatch metric alarm — one record per alarm. Used to verify that required CIS/SOC2 alarms for root-account usage, unauthorized API calls, IAM policy changes, and similar events are configured.

state.description: Current alarm state: OK, ALARM, or INSUFFICIENT_DATA.

metric_filter_pattern.description: CloudWatch Logs metric filter pattern that feeds this alarm.

has_sns_action.description: Alarm has at least one SNS topic configured for notifications.
